concept: Portão de zona com dois pylons ciano/âmbar, barra de scan horizontal, brackets retangulares e flash de confirmação.
selectionRationale: Feedback de arena novo, orientado a limites retangulares e varredura lateral; não repete o retículo de perigo, o pulso territorial ou o beacon radial.
prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: high-resolution 2D sprite-sheet source for a Bomba PvP arena feedback VFX. Primary request: create a coherent 4x4 storyboard grid with 16 sequential frames of a zone gate scan: two compact cyan-and-amber arena pylons stand at the left and right of a centered lane, a thin horizontal scan bar grows between them, four small corner brackets lock into a rectangular safe-zone gate, a white-cyan confirmation flash crosses the lane, then the scan retracts and the pylons return to idle. Each cell must contain exactly one centered frame with generous padding and identical framing, crisp readable pixel-art arena effect, no text and no UI. Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, no floor, no shadow, no gradient, no texture. Subject: isolated pair of pylons, horizontal scan, and rectangular boundary brackets. Style/medium: crisp high-resolution pixel-art game VFX with limited cyan-blue, amber-gold, white and deep-navy accents, hard readable edges with restrained glow. Composition/framing: square 4x4 grid, row-major temporal order, centered lane gate in every cell, consistent scale, 16 distinct smoothly progressing frames. Lighting/mood: tactical arena boundary confirmation, clear and controlled. Color palette: cyan, amber-gold, white highlight, navy accents; never use magenta in the subject. Materials/textures: luminous scan bar, angular pylon caps, crisp corner brackets and small pixel motes. Constraints: keep the chroma-key background perfectly uniform; preserve a full transparent-safe margin around every frame; no text, logos, watermark, characters, circular reticle, radial pulse, beacon orb, bomb, smoke, flames or extra UI. Avoid: duplicate frames, cut-off pylons, empty cells, perspective scenery, circular-only design and nonuniform background.

source.resolutionNote: A geração entregue pelo image_gen é nativa em 1254x1254; source-upscaled-2048.png é somente um derivado ampliado e não uma fonte nativa 2048px.

pipeline.alphaProcessing: Helper remove_chroma_key.py com auto-key de borda, soft matte, despill e edge-contract 1; depois recorte interno de 40px e extensão transparente centralizada para impedir contato com as bordas.

grok.requestedTask: Conferir a grade 4x4, tentar extrair frames e validar alpha, ordem, timing e bordas internas.
grok.result: Invoke-GrokWorker.ps1 retornou exit code 1 após a mensagem inicial e não criou arquivos.

pipeline.fallback: Extração, atlases, contact sheet, GIF e validação concluídos localmente com ImageMagick após a remoção de halo pelo helper.

validation.visualInspection: Contact sheet inspecionado após a remoção de chroma-key; pylons, scan, brackets, flash e retração permanecem legíveis sem halo magenta observável.

license: Visual gerado nesta thread; nenhum recurso externo ou pack adotado.
